summary: Testing Dynamic Master/Stock Schema (Phase 3) for Audix Counter Software. All 15 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI verification for Schema Builder, Master Products View, and Reports completed successfully.

issues: Extra column headers in report tables (DetailedTable, BarcodeWiseTable, ArticleWiseTable) use standard gray styling instead of purple styling. The cell values ARE purple (text-purple-700) but headers are not. Master Products View correctly has purple headers (text-purple-600). This is a minor inconsistency but doesn't affect functionality.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add className='text-purple-600' to SortableHeader for extra columns in PortalReports.jsx (lines 1132, 1222, 1309) to match purple header styling used in Master Products View
critical_code_review_comments: Template download (GET /api/portal/clients/{client_id}/schema/template?template_type=master|stock) generates correct CSV headers
Master import (POST /api/portal/clients/{client_id}/import-master) correctly stores custom fields in custom_fields dict
Master products endpoint returns extra_columns metadata alongside products
All consolidated report endpoints (detailed, barcode-wise, article-wise) return extra_columns in response
All individual session report endpoints return extra_columns in response
Frontend Schema Builder dialog fully functional with toggle fields, add custom field, download templates
Master Products View shows purple headers and values for extra columns - WORKING CORRECTLY
seed_data_creation: Created test master products (TEST_001, TEST_002) with custom fields (colour, size, brand) via pytest
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 (Dynamic Schema) testing complete. Schema Builder, template downloads, master import with custom fields, and report extra columns all working. Test client 'Reliance Retail' has schema with colour/size/brand enabled and test products imported.

features_verified.backend_schema_get: PASS - GET /api/portal/clients/{client_id}/schema returns default and saved schemas
features_verified.backend_template_stock: PASS - GET /api/portal/clients/{client_id}/schema/template?template_type=stock returns CSV with Location+Qty
features_verified.backend_import_master: PASS - Import stores custom fields in custom_fields dict
features_verified.backend_master_products: PASS - Returns extra_columns metadata with products
features_verified.frontend_schema_builder: PASS - Dialog opens, shows toggleable fields, add custom field section
features_verified.frontend_download_template: PASS - Master and Stock template buttons present
features_verified.frontend_master_products_view: PASS - Table shows purple headers and values for extra columns
features_verified.frontend_reports_extra_columns: PASS - Reports show extra columns (values purple, headers standard)
